positive: Minimalist abstract celestial landscape composition. A stylized grouping of crescent moons, constellations, and glowing nebula clusters forming an interlocking pattern. The aesthetic should be modern occult and dreamlike. Use deep indigo blues, cosmic violet, shimmering gold accents, and touches of ethereal teal. The design must feature clean, distinct lines and strong silhouettes suitable for a screen print, centered for optimal apparel placement. Composition must be balanced, with negative space used effectively to let the colors breathe. Ink wash texture, vector-style precision with painterly blending of light sources. High contrast, celestial symmetry, perfect for t-shirts and tote bags.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, messy, complex background, realism, photo, 3d render, muted colors
